findings.evidence: `Product.lean:61` opens `namespace Algebra.TensorProduct`; `Product.lean:72` proves `comp_productMap` using only `productMap`; Mathlib defines the target API in `Mathlib/RingTheory/TensorProduct/Maps.lean:757` and `:763`.
findings.fix: Move this lemma to an earlier generic tensor-product API file imported here, or make it private/local if it is only a proof helper for `mapValue_pointsMulEquiv_symm_apply`.
findings.issue: `TauCeti.Algebra.TensorProduct.comp_productMap` is plain `Algebra.TensorProduct.productMap` API, but it is introduced in the affine-group product file, so users must import algebraic-group/bialgebra material for a generic tensor-product postcomposition lemma.

summary: The product-points naturality lemmas are now in their canonical file, but the PR also exposes a generic tensor-product lemma from an algebraic-group module.
